name: openEuler sig-DevStation SIG
description: DevStation SIG is dedicated to providing developers with a a better openEuler development experience

name: openEuler sig-DevStation SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-DevStation SIG maintains 8 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-DevStation SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for DevStation SIG is dedicated to providing developers with a a better openEuler development experience. The SIG has 11 core members and maintains 8 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-DevStation SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-DevStation SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at DevStation@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-DevStation SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-DevStation SIG maintains 8 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-DevStation.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-DevStation SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-DevStation SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: Duan Pengjie, Zhu Zexu, Li Ping. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
